<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalvark (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-hâi]][[de:Metall-Schwein]][[eo:Xinhai]][[hak:Sîn-hoi]][[ja:辛亥]][[ko:신해]][[vi:Tân Hợi]][[za:Sinhaih]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-hāi]][[zh-yue:辛亥]][[zh:辛亥]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalvark (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-hâi]][[de:Metall-Schwein]][[eo:Xinhai]][[hak:Sîn-hoi]][[ja:辛亥]][[ko:신해]][[vi:Tân Hợi]][[za:Sinhaih]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-hāi]][[zh-yue:辛亥]][[zh:辛亥]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalvark (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-hâi]][[de:Metall-Schwein]][[eo:Xinhai]][[hak:Sîn-hoi]][[ja:辛亥]][[ko:신해]][[vi:Tân Hợi]][[za:Sinhaih]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-hāi]][[zh-yue:辛亥]][[zh:辛亥]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Pig|kanji=辛亥|romaji=kanoto i|onyomi=shingai|p=xīhài|w=hsin-hai|mi=ɕin⁵³ xaɪ̯|y=san1 hoi6|j=san1 hoi6|ci=sɐn hɐi|mc=sin ɣəi|oc-bs=sin ɢəʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
{{中華圏の事物
|タイトル = 壬申
|File種別 = 
|File = 
|Fileの説明 = 
|繁体字 = 辛亥
|簡体字 = 辛亥
|ピン音 = xīnhài
|通用ピン音 = 
|注音符号 = ㄒㄧㄣ ㄏㄞˋ
|ラテン字 = 
|カタカナ = シーンハイ
|漢音読み = しんがい
|慣用読み = かのとい<br>しんきんのいのしし
|ひらがな = 
|韓国語 = 신해
|ベトナム語 = {{Unicode|Tân Hợi|qq=}}
}}
'''Yin Fire Rooster also known as 丁酉''' (hinototori, teika no tori, teiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} symbol {{ill|Rooster (zodiac)|en|Rooster (zodiac)|WD=Q822621|lt=Rooster (酉)|1=Rooster (zodiac)}} represents yin {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Fire overcomes Metal).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Metal Pig (辛亥)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnhài
** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 hoi6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-i
***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-inoshishi
***Onyomi 1: shinkai
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinhhae (신해)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Hợi

<!--
==
* Yin Metal Pig (辛亥) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnhài
** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 hoi6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: かのといのしし (kanoto-inoshishi)
***Onyomi: しんかのいのしし (shinka-no-inoshishi)
***Onyomi: しんがい (shingai)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): sinhae
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Hợi

-->
==Years of Yin Metal Pig==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 51 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|Year|en|Year|WD=Q577|lt=year|1=Year}} of {{ill|Xinhai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yin Metal Pig (辛亥)'s years table'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|WD=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium|1=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|WD=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium|1=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|WD=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|AD 51|en|AD 51|WD=Q23439|lt=51 AD|1=AD 51}}
* {{ill|AD 111|en|AD 111|WD=Q30640|lt=111 AD|1=AD 111}}
* {{ill|171|en|171|WD=Q31289|lt=171 AD|1=171}}
* {{ill|231|en|231|WD=Q30742|lt=231 AD|1=231}}
* {{ill|291|en|291|WD=Q30956|lt=291 AD|1=291}}
* {{ill|351|en|351|WD=Q33576|lt=351 AD|1=351}}
* {{ill|AD 411|en|AD 411|WD=Q32764|lt=411 AD|1=AD 411}}
* {{ill|471|en|471|WD=Q31869|lt=471 AD|1=471}}
* {{ill|531|en|531|WD=Q32871|lt=531 AD|1=531}}
* {{ill|591|en|591|WD=Q33746|lt=591 AD|1=591}}
* {{ill|651|en|651|WD=Q31095|lt=651 AD|1=651}}
* {{ill|AD 711|en|AD 711|WD=Q23519|lt=711 AD|1=AD 711}}
* {{ill|771|en|771|WD=Q29950|lt=771 AD|1=771}}
* {{ill|831|en|831|WD=Q30372|lt=831 AD|1=831}}
* {{ill|891|en|891|WD=Q30580|lt=891 AD|1=891}}
* {{ill|951|en|951|WD=Q23654|lt=951 AD|1=951}}
|
* {{ill|1011|en|1011|WD=Q19238|lt=1011 AD|1=1011}}
* {{ill|1071|en|1071|WD=Q19432|lt=1071 AD|1=1071}}
* {{ill|1131|en|1131|WD=Q19579|lt=1131 AD|1=1131}}
* {{ill|1191|en|1191|WD=Q19738|lt=1191 AD|1=1191}}
* {{ill|1251|en|1251|WD=Q5494|lt=1251 AD|1=1251}}
* {{ill|1311|en|1311|WD=Q5731|lt=1311 AD|1=1311}}
* {{ill|1371|en|1371|WD=Q6255|lt=1371 AD|1=1371}}
* {{ill|1431|en|1431|WD=Q6344|lt=1431 AD|1=1431}}
* {{ill|1491|en|1491|WD=Q6676|lt=1491 AD|1=1491}}
* {{ill|1551|en|1551|WD=Q6560|lt=1551 AD|1=1551}}
* {{ill|1611|en|1611|WD=Q6768|lt=1611 AD|1=1611}}
* {{ill|1671|en|1671|WD=Q7610|lt=1671 AD|1=1671}}
* {{ill|1731|en|1731|WD=Q6963|lt=1731 AD|1=1731}}
* {{ill|1791|en|1791|WD=Q7784|lt=1791 AD|1=1791}}
* {{ill|1851|en|1851|WD=Q7656|lt=1851 AD|1=1851}}
* {{ill|1911|en|1911|WD=Q2076|lt=1911 AD|1=1911}}
* {{ill|1971|en|1971|WD=Q2475|lt=1971 AD|1=1971}}
|
* {{ill|2031 AD|ja|2031年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2031|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2031 AD|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|2091 AD|ja|2091年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2091|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2091 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 2090年代|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|2151 AD|ja|2151年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2151|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2151 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 22世紀|1=22nd century|WD=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2211 AD|ja|2211年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2211|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2211 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 23世紀|1=23rd century|WD=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2271 AD|ja|2271年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2271|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2271 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 23世紀|1=23rd century|WD=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2331 AD|ja|2331年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2331|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2331 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2391 AD|ja|2391年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2391|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2391 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 24世紀|1=24th century|WD=Q49838}}
* {{ill|2451 AD|ja|2451年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2451|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2451 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2511 AD|ja|2511年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2511|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2511 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2571 AD|ja|2571年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2571|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2571 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2631 AD|ja|2631年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2631|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2631 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2691 AD|ja|2691年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2691|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2691 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2751 AD|ja|2751年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2751|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2751 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2811 AD|ja|2811年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2811|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2811 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2871 AD|ja|2871年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2871|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2871 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2931 AD|ja|2931年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2931|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2931 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2991 AD|ja|2991年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2991|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2991 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
|}

=== Events ===
* {{ill|1911|en|1911|WD=Q2076|lt=1911 AD|1=1911}} – {{ill|1911 Revolution|en|1911 Revolution|WD=Q190517|lt=Xinhai Revolution|1=1911 Revolution}}

==Months of Yin Metal Pig==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|October|en|October|WD=Q124|lt=October|1=October}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}} of {{ill|Xinhai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter|1=Lidong}} until the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow|1=Daxue (solar term)}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Metal Pig==
=== 選日 ===
None.

==See Also==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:Īt-chú]]
[[zh-yue:乙卯]]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Metal Pig|qq=ja|辛亥|version=101506609|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:Ék-cṳ̄de]]
[[nds:Erd-Haseni]]
[[de:Yin Metal Pig]]

[[ja:辛亥]]
[[zh:辛亥]]
[[ko:신해]]
[[fr:Cochon de métal]]
[[de:Metall-Schwein]]

[[af:Aardehaas (astrologie)]]
[[de:Erde-Hasenei]]
[[en:Earth Rabbit]]
[[fr:Lièvre de terreboishak]]
[[it:Yit-chṳ́id]]

[[ko:을묘]]
[[vi:Ất Mão]]
[[za:Yitceij]]
[[zh:乙卯]]
[[ar:Yin Metal Pig]]

<!--Yin Metal Pig--><!--Yin Metal Pig-->

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Metaalvark (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Sĭng-hâi]]
[[eo:Xinhai]]
[[hak:Sîn-hoi]]
[[vi:Tân Hợi]]
[[za:Sinhaih]]
[[zh-min-nan:Sin-hāi]]
[[zh-yue:辛亥]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Metaalvark (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Sĭng-hâi]]
[[eo:Xinhai]]
[[hak:Sîn-hoi]]
[[vi:Tân Hợi]]
[[za:Sinhaih]]
[[zh-min-nan:Sin-hāi]]
[[zh-yue:辛亥]]
{{wikidata link|Q905052}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
